name: newtype-codex
description: newtype content-team workflow for Codex, packaged as one orchestration skill plus eight custom agent templates.

interface.shortDescription: One orchestration skill plus eight content-team agents.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native packaging of newtype's content-team workflow. One Chief skill teaches Codex how to route, resume, install, and coordinate the eight optional custom agents while leaving out OpenCode-specific runtime integration.
defaultPrompt: Use newtype-chief to coordinate the newtype content team for researching and drafting an article.
Use newtype-chief to fact-check and improve this draft.
Use newtype-chief to install or refresh the newtype agents globally.
